sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الحُكُومَةُ زِرَاعَةَ مَلْيُونِ شَجَرَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِحِمَايَةِ البِيئَةِ مِنَ التَّلَوُّثِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je odlučila posaditi milion novih stabala kako bi zaštitila životnu sredinu od zagađenja.
sentences.translationEn: The government decided to plant one million new trees to protect the environment from pollution.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ المُتَطَوِّعُونَ العَمَلَ فِي الغَابَاتِ القَرِيبَةِ مِنَ العَاصِمَةِ هَذَا الأُسْبُوعَ.
sentences.translation: Volonteri su ove sedmice počeli raditi u šumama u blizini glavnog grada.
sentences.translationEn: Volunteers began working in the forests near the capital this week.

sentences.arabic: تُعَانِي المِنْطَقَةُ مِنْ جَفَافٍ شَدِيدٍ بِسَبَبِ التَّغَيُّرِ المُنَاخِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Regija pati od velike suše zbog klimatskih promjena.
sentences.translationEn: The region suffers from severe drought due to climate change.

sentences.arabic: يَأْمُلُ المَسْؤُولُونَ أَنْ تُسَاعِدَ هَذِهِ الأَشْجَارُ فِي تَنْقِيَةِ الهَوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Zvaničnici se nadaju da će ovo drveće pomoći u pročišćavanju zraka.
sentences.translationEn: Officials hope these trees will help purify the air.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ المُبَادَرَةُ جُزْءٌ مِنْ خُطَّةٍ وَطَنِيَّةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova inicijativa je dio velikog nacionalnog plana za očuvanje prirode.
sentences.translationEn: This initiative is part of a large national plan to preserve nature.
